text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Beneficiary Plan Election and Auto-Assignment │ October 2021 │ V 1.3 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in Medicare Part D Beneficiary Plan Election and 
Auto-Assignment file. Each entry contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

APLCTN_DT 

LABEL: Part D Plan application date 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the date the Part D plan sponsor
